title: July 1
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 1''' is the 182nd day of the year (183rd in leap years), with 183 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1935|1935]] – [[David Prowse]] is born.
*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Brian George]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Matt Jacobs]] is born.
*[[1960s|1969]] – [[Rino Romano]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Ariyon Bakare]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Steve Argyle]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Adam Howden]] is born.
*1983 – [[Kyle Soller]] is born.
*[[1992]] – ''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]'' published.
*[[1993]] – [[Classic Star Wars 11|''Classic Star Wars'' 11]] published.
*[[1994]] – ''[[Classic Star Wars: A New Hope 2]]'' is published.
*1994 – [[Dark Apprentice (novel)|''Dark Apprentice'']] published.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'' published.
*1995 – [[River of Chaos 2|''River of Chaos'' 2]] published.
*1995 – [[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine 4|''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 4]] published.
*1995 – ''[[Star Wars Technical Journal of the Imperial Forces]]'' published.
*[[1996]] – [[Shadows of the Empire 3|''Shadows of the Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Vader's Fortress]]'' published.
*1997 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Delusions of Grandeur]]'' published.
*1997 – ''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Star Wars Journal: Hero for Hire]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Star Wars Journal: The Fight for Justice]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 11: Bounty Hunters vs. Battle Droids]]'' published.
*1998 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 30|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 30]] published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice Special Edition: Deceptions]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic III: Reunion]]'' published.
*2003 – [[Star Wars Insider 69|''Star Wars Insider'' 69]] published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The False Peace]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars Insider 89|''Star Wars Insider'' 89]] released for subscribers.
*[[2009]] – [[Invasion 1|''Invasion'' 1]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[StarWars.com]] revamped.
*[[2015]] – [[Darth Vader (2015) 7|''Darth Vader'' (2015) 7]] published.
*2015 – [[Princess Leia 5|''Princess Leia'' 5]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge - Episode 5|''Star Wars: Jedi Temple Challenge'' - Episode 5]] premieres.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars Day-at-a-Time Calendar 2025|''Star Wars'' Day-at-a-Time Calendar 2025]] released
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures – Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone (trade paperback)]]'' published.
*2025 – ''[[Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith: The 20th Anniversary Special Edition]]'' published.
<noinclude>
